_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: The NF1 Schwann cells had similar Ref-1 expression to the wt cells, while the MPNST lines were upregulated approximately twofold to threefold
details: Upregulated Ref-1 expression approximately twofold to threefold compared to immortalized wt Schwann cells
